examples.title: AES Key Expansion
examples.code:
KeyExpansion(byte[] key)
BEGIN
  for i from 0 to 3
    w[i] = key[4*i to 4*i+3]
  for i from 4 to 43
    temp = w[i-1]
    if i mod 4 == 0
      temp = SubWord(RotWord(temp)) XOR Rcon[i/4]
    w[i] = w[i-4] XOR temp
END
examples.explanation: Generates 44 32-bit round keys from initial key
